channel.title: Verification, Validation and Testing on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Verification, Validation and Testing on CEDIS

item.title: Verification, Validation and Testing
item.description: The area of Verification, Validation, and Testing is a critical discipline in software engineering, focused on ensuring that software products meet their specified requirements and function as expected.

item.title: People
item.description: Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the Software Engineering undergraduate program on software quality, digital government, and software engineering education.

item.title: People
item.description: Adjunct Professor at the University of Brasília (UnB), working in the undergraduate Software Engineering program on software engineering, software metrics, testing, and software quality.
